title: Salary Converter
description: Convert monthly salary, hourly wage, and annual pay with your work schedule.

openGraph.title: Salary Converter
openGraph.description: Convert hourly pay, monthly salary, and annual income with your exact work schedule. Adjust workdays, hours per day, and average weeks per month to compare hourly, daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly earnings in one place.

tips: Uses the monthly average of 4.345 weeks by default and converts between hourly, monthly, and annual pay.
